title: Amnesia's Extractors
description: A set of Extractors that mine up ores for you
body:
This mod adds a set of 3 extractors every level adding a new benefit to the loot drops

The Basic Extractor can be crafted at iron level, The Upgraded Extractor can be made by putting a Basic Extractor in a smithing table with an Iron block and Upgraded Extractor Template which can only be found in underground structures. The Nether Extractor can be made by putting a Upgraded Extractor in a smithing table with an Gold block and Nether Extractor Template which can only be found in nether structures. Each will drop something everything 20 seconds.

Basic Extractor
- Coal(57%), Raw Iron or Raw Copper (28%) and Raw Gold or Redstone (14%)

Upgraded Extractor
- Coal(51%), Raw Iron or Raw Copper (25%), Raw Gold or Redstone (12%), Lapis or Amethyst (5%) and Diamond (3%)
- In Mesa, Coal(51%), Raw Gold or Raw Copper (25%), Raw Iron or Redstone (12%), Lapis or Amethyst (5%) and Diamonds (3%)
- In Mountain, Coal(51%), Raw Iron or Raw Copper (25%), Raw Gold or Redstone (12%), Lapis or Emerald or Amethyst (5%) and Diamond (3%)
- In Deepdark, Raw Iron or Raw Copper (51%), Raw Gold or Redstone (25%), Lapis or Amethyst (12%), Diamond (5%) and Echo Shards (3%)
- On Amethyst in any biome, Amethyst (57%), Emerald (28%) and Diamond (14%)

Nether Extractor
- In Nether, Gold Nuggets(57%), Quartz (28%) and Gold Ingot or Netherite Scrap (14%)
